hibernate-mapping.sql-query: INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_StatementLetterCore (ROI_Requestor_Seq, RequestorName, RequestorPhone, RequestorAddress1, RequestorAddress2, RequestorAddress3, RequestorCity, RequestorState, RequestorPostalCode, Country_Name, ResendDate, OutputMethod, QueuePassword, TemplateName, ROI_LetterTemplateFile_Seq, Notes, DateRange, RequestorCharges, AdjustmentAmount, PaymentAmount, RequestorBalance, UnAppliedAdjustment, unAppliedPayment, AgingBalance30, AgingBalance60, AgingBalance90, AgingBalanceOther, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq) VALUES ( :requestorId, :requestorName, :requestorPhone, :requestorAddress1, :requestorAddress2, :requestorAddress3, :requestorCity, :requestorState, :requestorPostalCode, :requestorCountry, :resendDate, :outputMethod, :queuePassword, :templateName, :templateId, :notes, :dateRange, :charges, :adjustmentAmount, :paymentAmount, :RequestorBalance, :UnAppliedAdjustment, :unAppliedPayment, :agingBalance30, :agingBalance60, :agingBalance90, :agingBalanceOther, :createdDate, :createdBy, :modifiedDate, :modifiedBy); select scope_identity() as requestorLetterId;

SELECT ROI_StatementLetterCore_Seq requestorLetterId, ROI_Requestor_Seq requestorId, RequestorName requestorName, RequestorPhone requestorPhone, RequestorAddress1 requestorAddress1, RequestorAddress2 requestorAddress2, RequestorAddress3 requestorAddress3, RequestorCity requestorCity, RequestorState requestorState, RequestorPostalCode requestorPostalCode, Country_Name requestorCountry, ResendDate resendDate, OutputMethod outputMethod, QueuePassword queuePassword, TemplateName templateName, ROI_LetterTemplateFile_Seq requestTemplateId, Created_Dt createdDate, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, Notes notesString, DateRange dateRangeAsString, RequestorCharges charges, AdjustmentAmount adjustmentAmount, PaymentAmount paymentAmount, RequestorBalance balances, UnAppliedAdjustment unAppliedAdjustment, UnAppliedPayment unAppliedPayment, AgingBalance30 balance30, AgingBalance60 balance60, AgingBalance90 balance90, AgingBalanceOther balanceOther
FROM cabinet..ROI_StatementLetterCore WHERE ROI_StatementLetterCore_Seq = :requestorLetterId

SELECT ROI_StatementLetterCore_Seq requestorLetterId, Created_Dt createdDate, ResendDate resendDate, OutputMethod outputMethod, (select usr.fullname from users usr where usr.userinstanceId = Created_By_Seq) createdBy, ROI_LetterTemplateFile_Seq requestTemplateId, TemplateName templateUsed, QueuePassword queuePassword FROM cabinet..ROI_StatementLetterCore WHERE ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId
